projects.title: ReBELS
projects.fullTitle: Resolving Biological carbon Export in the Labrador Sea
projects.description: Understanding how winter convection and spring restratification control biological carbon export in the Labrador Sea using autonomous platforms and ship-based observations.

projects.title: POLOMINTS
projects.fullTitle: Polar Ocean Mixing by Internal Tsunamis
projects.description: Investigating the role of internal waves and mixing in polar ocean biogeochemistry and carbon cycling.

projects.title: PARTITRICS
projects.fullTitle: PARTIcle Transformation and Respiration Influence on ocean Carbon Storage
projects.description: Quantifying particle transformation processes and their impact on carbon export efficiency in the twilight zone.

projects.title: IDAPro
projects.description: Integrating physical and biological drivers of productivity across Atlantic Ocean regions to understand carbon export variability.

projects.title: GLIDERS I
projects.fullTitle: GLider-type Infrastructure and Digital Environment for Research Science
projects.description: Developing glider infrastructure and data pipelines for sustained ocean observation.

projects.title: GLIDERS II
projects.fullTitle: GLider-type Infrastructure and Digital Environment for Research Science
projects.description: Expanding glider capabilities and observing networks for ecosystem monitoring.

projects.title: APART
projects.fullTitle: Autonomous Platforms as A Research Tool
projects.description: Training and capacity building for autonomous platform deployment and data analysis.

projects.title: TechOceans
projects.description: Developing and testing new sensor technologies for autonomous ocean platforms.

projects.title: BIARRITZ
projects.fullTitle: Bridging International Activity and Related Research Into the Twilight Zone
projects.description: International collaboration on twilight zone biogeochemistry and carbon export processes.

projects.title: GOCART
projects.fullTitle: Glider Observations and Connectivity Along a Reproductive Tract
projects.description: Using ocean gliders to study phytoplankton dynamics and productivity on the Agulhas Bank.

projects.title: COMICS
projects.fullTitle: Controls Over Ocean Mesopelagic Interior Carbon Storage
projects.description: Investigating mesopelagic carbon storage mechanisms in the South Atlantic and around South Georgia.

projects.title: CUSTARD
projects.fullTitle: Carbon Uptake and Seasonal Traits in Antarctic Remineralisation Depth
projects.description: Examining seasonal controls on carbon export and remineralization in the Southern Ocean.

projects.title: PAL-LTER
projects.description: Long-term ecological research along the West Antarctic Peninsula examining climate impacts on marine ecosystems.

projects.title: FIRe-Glider
projects.fullTitle: Fluorescence Induction and Relaxation on Gliders
projects.description: Developing and deploying fluorescence-based phytoplankton physiology sensors on autonomous gliders.

themes.biophysical: Biophysical Controls on Marine Productivity and Carbon Export
